title: Ligation Sequencing Kit: DNA Repair and End-Prep
author: Opentrons

steps.title: This protocol automates the DNA Repair...
steps.instruction: This protocol automates the DNA Repair and End Prep portion for preparing sequencing libraries in the Oxford Nanopore Ligation Sequencing Kit. The second part of this protocol can be found here: [Adapter Ligation and Clean-Up](https://protocols.opentrons.com/protocol/516336-part-2) **Note**: The protocol was updated on September 22nd, 2022 Explanation of parameters below: * `Number of Samples`: Specify the number of samples in multiples of 8 (Max: 96). * `P300 Multichannel GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify the mount position of the P300 Multichannel. * `P300 Single GEN2 Mount Position`: Specify the mount position of the P300 Multichannel. * `Magnetic Module Generation`: Specify whether using Gen 1 or Gen 2 magnetic module. * `Magnetic Module Engage Height from Well Bottom (mm)`: Specify the height of the magnets from the bottom of the well. ---

steps.title: Cool Temperature Module to 6C
steps.instruction: Cool Temperature Module to 6C

steps.title: Transfer master mix and put into PCR plate
steps.instruction: Transfer master mix and put into PCR plate

steps.title: Mix plate and pause for spin down step
steps.instruction: Mix plate and pause for spin down step. Afterwards, Pre-Heat Thermocycler to 20C and Lid Temperature to 70C.

steps.title: Incubate on Thermocycler at 20C for...
steps.instruction: Incubate on Thermocycler at 20C for 5 mins and 65C for 5 mins

steps.title: Resuspend AMPure beads by pipette mixing
steps.instruction: Resuspend AMPure beads by pipette mixing

steps.title: Transfer samples from BioRad Plate on...
steps.instruction: Transfer samples from BioRad Plate on TC to MIDI Plate on Mag Mod

steps.title: Add 60 uL of AMPure XP...
steps.instruction: Add 60 uL of AMPure XP to the samples on MIDI Plate on Mag Mod

steps.title: Mix samples on MIDI plate with pipette
steps.instruction: Mix samples on MIDI plate with pipette

steps.title: Pause step for Hula mixer
steps.instruction: Pause step for Hula mixer

steps.title: Pause step for spin down
steps.instruction: Pause step for spin down

steps.title: Engage magnet and delay for 5...
steps.instruction: Engage magnet and delay for 5 minutes for beads to pellet

steps.title: After 5 minutes, while engaged, remove supernatant
steps.instruction: After 5 minutes, while engaged, remove supernatant

steps.title: While engaged, wash beads with 200 uL of ethanol
steps.instruction: While engaged, wash beads with 200 uL of ethanol

steps.title: Remove ethanol/supernatant
steps.instruction: Remove ethanol/supernatant. Discard tip.

steps.title: Repeat 12-13
steps.instruction: Repeat 12-13

steps.title: Pause for spin down
steps.instruction: Pause for spin down.

steps.title: While engaged, remove any residual ethanol
steps.instruction: While engaged, remove any residual ethanol. Delay for 30 seconds for drying.

steps.title: Disengage mag mod and add 61 uL of nuclease-free water
steps.instruction: Disengage mag mod and add 61 uL of nuclease-free water. Delay for 2 mins at room temp.

steps.title: Engage magnet until eluate is clear (5 minutes)
steps.instruction: Engage magnet until eluate is clear (5 minutes)

steps.title: Transfer 61 uL of eluate into...
steps.instruction: Transfer 61 uL of eluate into Bio-Rad PCR Plate (Slot 2) for part 2.
